# Positive fixtures for owner-decision-tracker regex tightening per Sub-slice A.
# Each non-comment line represents text that SHOULD match exactly one of the 7
# prose-decision-ask patterns after tightening per
# bridge/gtkb-gov-askuserquestion-enforcement-stack-slice-a-hook-reenable-007.md.
# At least one positive fixture per pattern.

# offering_or_choice
Want me to clear pending or defer all of them?
Want me to file Sub-slice B or pause until owner directs?

# should_i_or
Should I file -005 or wait for the umbrella?
Should I commit and push now or wait for review?

# awaiting_input_q (interrogative)
Awaiting your direction?
Awaiting owner approval on the next step?

# awaiting_input_first_person (active wait)
I am awaiting your direction on which option to pick.
I'm awaiting owner approval on the deferred items.

# standing_by_for_q (interrogative)
Standing by for owner approval?

# standing_by_for_first_person (active wait)
I'm standing by for your decision on the deferred items.
We are standing by for owner direction on the next priority.

# your_decision_q
Your decision on the next sub-slice priority?
What is your choice between Path A or Path B for the deferred items?
